section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure is 127/76. A slight 3/6 systolic ejection murmur is heard at the left base. The right radial artery cardiac cath site is clean, dry, and intact with a palpable pulse. Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally. Jugular venous distention is not appreciated. No carotid bruits are detected.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are objective physical exam findings and vitals, not an assessment or diagnostic impression.
